title: scadoxus multiflorus subsp. longitubus
intro: Scadoxus multiflorus subsp. longitubus, commonly known as the Yellow Ball or Kaffir Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a cardiac stimulant and to have antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Scadoxus multiflorus subsp. longitubus include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory disorders. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of infusions or decoctions, have been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
